sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(a1.id) FROM sys_appbutton_t a1,sys_appbutton_t a2 WHERE a1.validflag > 0 AND a2.validflag > 0 AND a1.parentid = a2.id AND a1.parentid > 0
a1.btnname like '%$btnname$%'

SELECT a1.*,a2.btnname AS parentname FROM sys_appbutton_t a1,sys_appbutton_t a2 WHERE a1.validflag > 0 AND a2.validflag > 0 AND a1.parentid = a2.id AND a1.parentid > 0
a1.btnname like '%$btnname$%'
ORDER BY a2.orderno,a1.parentid,a1.orderno
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_appbutton_t (btnname,parentid,icon,orderno,btntype,addoperator,addtime) VALUES ('$btnname$',$parentid$,'$icon$',$orderno$,$btntype$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_appbutton_t SET validflag = 0 WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE sys_appbutton_t SET btnname = '$btnname$',parentid = $parentid$,orderno = $orderno$,icon='$icon$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM sys_appbutton_t WHERE parentid = 0 AND validflag > 0 ORDER BY orderno

SELECT * FROM sys_appbutton_t WHERE validflag > 0
btnname like '%$btnname$%'
ORDER BY orderno
SELECT a1.*,a2.btnname AS parentname FROM( SELECT * FROM sys_appbutton_t WHERE id = $id$)a1 LEFT JOIN sys_appbutton_t a2 ON a1.parentid = a2.id
SELECT * FROM sys_appbutton_t WHERE FIND_IN_SET(id,(SELECT appbuttonIds FROM sys_role_appbutton_t where roleid=$roleid$)) and btntype=1
SELECT * FROM sys_appbutton_t WHERE parentid=$parentid$ and FIND_IN_SET(id,(select appbuttonids from sys_role_appbutton_t where roleId=$roleId$))
